narrative_beat: Pregador arquetipico em pulpito, bracos erguidos, manto negro com gola bordo, rosto parcial na sombra

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an archetypal 50-year-old preacher at a dark wooden pulpit with raised arms
subject.focal_point: the preacher's raised hands catching golden overhead light
subject.secondary: Black robe with deep burgundy collar, face partially in shadow hiding identity. Golden overhead beam isolates his silhouette.
props: black clerical robe with burgundy collar
open Bible on pulpit in warm amber

composition.foreground: preacher in rich crimson and gold tones, dramatic chiaroscuro
composition.midground: pulpit with open Bible glowing warm amber
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white blurred crowd silhouettes in pews

lighting.key_light: harsh warm top-down light from above-front
lighting.fill_light: faint amber bounce from open Bible

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Em setembro de dois mil e vinte e cinco, um pastor sul-africano convenceu milhares de cristaos a venderem tudo.
